name: Bar of Deathnation
description:
This was once the bar of divination. Now is the bar o deathnation.....uahuhauha
uahauha(Aren't you going to laugh?).

extra_descriptions.description:
The sign reads:
Free instructions provided by the waiter:

   Buy  - Buy something (drinkable) from the waiter.
   List - The waiter will show you all the different drinks and
          specialties, and tell the price of each.
